title: malacothamnus fremontii var. fremontii
intro: Malacothamnus fremontii var. fremontii, also known as Fremont's bush mallow, is a variety of flowering plant in the mallow family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Fremont's bush mallow include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Fremont's bush mallow can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and salves, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional.
